title: Fmag_LowerLevel Property
description: Sets or returns the lower threshold values for resultant force.
notes:
Fmag_LowerLevel sets or returns the lower thresholds for resultant force.

This is used for error checking and task completion conditions.
see_also:
Applies To

Force Control

Force Trigger
examples:
Function SettingLevels FSet FT1.Enabled, False, False, False, False, False, False, True, False FSet FT1.Fmag_Polarity, FG_OUT FSet FT1.Fmag_Levels, 0, 50 Trap 1, FT1 Call ForceError
Fend
